SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Controller

Class Controller

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Controller.Controller
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener
public class Controller extends Object implements EventListener
This class is the controller of the game: its function is to coordinate the model and the views. It's subscribed as a listener a list of VirtualViews (one for each player).

  • Constructor Details

    • Controller

      public Controller(int numPlayers) throws WrongNumberOfPlayersException
      Class constructor
      Parameters:
      numPlayers - the number of players of the game associated to this instance of Controller (requires numPlayers between 2 and 4)
      Throws:
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException - if numPlayers is less than 2 or more than 4.

  • Method Details

    • addView

      public void addView(VirtualView view)
      Subscribe this instance of Controller as a listener of a VirtualView
      Parameters:
      view - the VirtualView to subscribe to.

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(Event e) throws WrongNumberOfPlayersException, DuplicateNicknameException, InvalidPlacementException, WrongInformationException, NotYourTurnException, EmptyDeckException, InvalidSearchPositionException, IllegalStateException, InvalidParameterException
      Listen to an Event and execute the corresponding command
      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface EventListener
      Parameters:
      e - the listened Event
      Throws:
      WrongNumberOfPlayersException
      DuplicateNicknameException
      InvalidPlacementException
      WrongInformationException
      NotYourTurnException
      EmptyDeckException
      InvalidSearchPositionException
      IllegalStateException
      InvalidParameterException

    • getModel

      public GameModel getModel()
      Get the model associated to this Controller
      Returns:
      an instance of GameModel

      Invalidate the model associated to this Controller
